title: Build the SQLite-backed Kioku storage layer
acceptance_criteria: Kioku documents can be upserted, fetched, and deleted through a SQLite-backed adapter.
The storage layer preserves canonical document fields needed for search and retrieval.
Storage mutations are isolated from RelayHQ vault state.
SQLite schema and repository behavior are covered by tests.
completion_summary: Built the SQLite-backed Kioku storage layer with in-memory test support, FTS search, and explicit document CRUD operations.
